title: More Vanilla Weapons
description: This mod adds more variety to weapon selection by adding all types of weapons with different stats to fit your playstyle.
body:
Tired of using the same weapons and tools? then this mod is for you! Now available for 1.20!

This mod adds more variety to weapon selection in Minecraft by adding all types of weapons with different stats to fit your playstyle.

**_You can give me feedback_** [Here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSee_2I_OR5DdTd5TZxxyrA0T8yryKIRlPX4MGgIM7Uf6fioQQ/viewform)
![Weapons](https://i.imgur.com/ZPeYl28.png)

![15% off](https://i.imgur.com/tSGOxDQ.png)

Double axe:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
High damage medium-speed weapon. Two-Handed
</details>

Hammer:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
High damage, low speed, Has more knockback.
</details>

Katana:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
A little faster than a sword but a little weaker with more reach.
</details>

Knife:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
A high-speed low damage weapon -0.5 reach
</details>

Scythe:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Fast speed low damage, can hit multiple mobs with one hit.
</details>

Spade:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Decent speed, Decent Damage shovel that Stuns mobs.
</details>

Rapier:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
A high-speed balanced damage weapon that can hit one enemy at a time.
</details>
Lance:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
High damage mid-speed, right-click to dash foward.
</details>
Halberd:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Higher damage, slower, longer-range axe. Two-Handed
</details>
Long sword:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Higher damage, slower, longer-range sword. Two-Handed
</details>

Flail (used to be Mace)::
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Slightly less damage than a sword, as fast as a diamond axe, has a 50% chance to do a critical hit that deals more damage than a normal crit.
</details>

Pole:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
A long-reaching weapon with medium speed and medium damage. Two-Handed
</details>

War Hammer:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
An armor piercing weapon with decent speed and below-average damage
</details>
Tiered Bows:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Bows that charge faster and launch arrows faster with more durability
</details>

Tiered Crossbows:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Crossbows that deal more damage and launch arrows faster with more durability
</details>

Dagger:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Fast but weak damage, deals 2x damage when crouching, -0.3 range
</details>

Saber:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Fast with decent damage, takes 25% of damage dealt to the player.
</details>

Glaive:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Decent Speed with decent damage, +1 reach
</details>
